desc:
The base of the Great Tree lies below, the newbie area just a short jump
from the trunk upon which you precariously cling.  Up above are the many
branchings of the Great Tree, the system of branches making a vweritable
highway in the sky where movement can be seen from the many creatures which
inhabit the tree even from here.  A hole in the trunk opens up into the tree
northward, a small home visible inside.

extra_descs.desc:
Great Newbie Tree
* Built by Kaan for Dibrova
Level: 1 - 10
78 rooms
19 mobs
7 objs
Connector Zone(s): None, this is a floating newbie area
This is a huge tree that newbie players may climb into and find all
manner of tree-dwelling creatures. Eq has extremely low stats, as do
all mobs.

name: Lower Trunk of the Great Tree

desc:
The tree's branches open out wide and full over the entire newbie area,
making it possible to wander about the tree limbs, looking down upon Dibrova's
world.  The way down to the main Newbie Area lies just below, a steady climb
upward is also possible.  Branches lead out in every direction.
name: On the Trunk at the Lower Branch System

desc:
The tree's branches open out wide and full over the entire newbie area,
making it possible to wander about the tree limbs, looking down upon Dibrova's
world.  The way down to the main Newbie Area lies just below, a steady climb
upward is also possible.  Branches lead out in every direction.
name: On the Trunk at Mid Branch System

desc:
This is as far up as is safely possible within the Great Tree.  The trunk
above this point is not strong enough to hold any substantial weight.
Branches lead off in every direction, the upper branch system still just as
strong as the branches below.
name: On the Trunk at the Upper Branch System

desc:
This inner trunk has been carved out and made into a cozy little home
complete with a lounge chair and small bed made from twigs and leaves.
Another small chamber is connected to the north through a short archway.
name: Inside the Trunk

desc:
This is the inner abode of a treant, a being made from the very essence of
the tree in which it resides.  Only the most foolish would attempt to defy a
treant within its own home.
name: Inside the Trunk

desc:
The branches here are very strong and thick due to their proximity to the
trunk itself.  Branchings lead off in every direction, the trunk being just to
the south.
name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:
The branches here are very strong and thick due to their proximity to the
trunk itself.  Branchings lead off to the south and the west from here.
name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:
The branches here are very strong and thick due to their proximity to the
trunk itself.  Branchings lead off in every direction, the trunk being just to
the west.
name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:
The branches here are very strong and thick due to their proximity to the
trunk itself.  Branchings lead off to the north and the west from here.
name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:

the north.
name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:

name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:

name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:
The branches here are very strong and thick due to their proximity to the

name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:
The branches are still strong enough to hold a good amount of weight,
however it would not be recommended that the limits be pushed too far.  The
only way back to another section of the tree lies to the east.
name: The Outer Branches

desc:
The branches are still strong enough to hold a good amount of weight,
however it would not be recommended that the limits be pushed too far.  Exits
lead in every direction via the branch system, the inner branches lie just to
the south.
name: The Outer Branches

desc:
Although the current level of height is not as high as it could be, judging
from the branches that can be seen overhead, it still seems quite high when
standing at the end of this tree limb, feeling it sway in the breeze.  The way
back lies south.
name: Out on a Limb

desc:
Although the current level of height is not as high as it could be, judging
from the branches that can be seen overhead, it still seems quite high when
standing at the end of this tree limb, feeling it sway in the breeze.  The way
back lies west.
name: Out on a Limb

desc:
The branches lead out from the trunk of the tree, about halfway up from the
ground at this point.  The branches are still very strong, able to hold
enormous weight if needed.  Exits lead in every direction, the main trunk just
to the south.
name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:
The branches of the Great Tree span a very large area, allowing homes for a
number of exotic creatures which somehow coexist within this tree in peace.
Branchings lie to the south and the west.
name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:
The drop down below is a bit further than would be comfortable, bit in
glancing up higher it is seen that there is still more height to be attained.
The only way back along a branch is to the east.
name: The Outer Branches

desc:
The branches lead off in every direction from this point, the only
solid-looking pathway along the branches is to the south.
name: The Outer Branches

desc:
The drop down below is a bit further than would be comfortable, bit in

The only direction to travel is back along a branch to the west.

desc:
The branch comes to a dead end, hanging high above the newbie area.  The
branch continues out a bit further, however is is certainly not strong enough
to hold any large amount of weight.  The only direction to go is back toward
the trunk.
name: Out on a Limb

desc:

to hold any large amount of weight.  The only direction to go is back toward
the trunk.

desc:
These are the strongest of the upper branches, easily as thick as a giant's
armspan.  Still, even with the strength of the Tree's trunk so close and the
thickness of the branches themselves, they sway alarmingly with the wind.
name: Traveling the Inner Branches

desc:

armspan.  Still, even with the strength of the Tree's trunk so close and the
thickness of the branches themselves, they sway alarmingly with the wind.

desc:
The top of the Great Tree is a beautiful, stunning panorama of views and
vistas which look out over the entire world in all its splendor.  A slow wind
blows by, ruffling the leaves all around, causing the branches to sway ever so
slightly.
name: The Outer Branches

desc:
The steady swaying of the Tree from the winds which buffet it at this
altitude is strangely pacific, a very nonassuming sway which is absolutely no
cause for alarm.  Branches of the Tree lie in every direction.
name: The Outer Branches

desc:

desc:
This is the absolute limit of the Tree's reach in both height and direction.
The only way to go is back toward the trunk.
name: Out on a Limb
